'''Arden''' was the fourth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] and the only [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] in the [[Bakura system/Legends|Bakura system]]. It was named after [[Deredith Arden]], the founder of [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]]. Arden was orbited by seven [[Moon/Legends|moons]].<ref name="TEA" />

{{Planet-stub}}
